caption: A woman with light-brown hair tied up and wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. Behind her is a white wall and a dark screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text. To her right is a yellow vertical strip bordering a dark surface. On-screen graphics appear in the lower left and center, including a logo that says "TALK 101 PODCAST" and text that reads "ROSS TALK 101" and "By 11 logo studio". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, gesturing with her right hand and slightly shifting her facial expressions and head position while maintaining her focus toward an off-screen interlocutor. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle is a medium close-up, keeping the subject centered throughout the clip.
